reconnectingTitle: WebSocket dropped. The machine stays marked ONLINE for ~90s after a disconnect to absorb network blips; actions will fail until the agent reconnects.
criticalBadgeTitle: Critical machine: reboot and stop of critical services are blocked
sudoersBadgeTitle: New agent actions require up-to-date sudoers. Re-run install-agent.sh (without --enrollment-token) to refresh the binary AND sudoers. ⚠ The automatic binary update alone is not enough — this is not a re-enrollment.

actions.agentUpToDate: Agent already on the latest version

confirm.revokeDesc: The agent will be disconnected immediately and won't be able to communicate with Nexus until it is re-enrolled.
confirm.deleteDesc: This action is irreversible. All metrics and audit history related to this machine will be deleted.
confirm.rebootDesc: The machine will go down then come back in about 60s. Confirm by typing REBOOT.

overview.label: Overview
overview.tooltip: Global status: alerts, failed services, pending updates, expiring certs

processes.label: Processes
processes.tooltip: Top 10 processes by CPU and RAM, kill possible

logs.label: Log shipping
logs.tooltip: Forward the systemd journal to a central Loki via Fluent Bit

services.label: Services
services.tooltip: systemd: start/stop/restart, link to journalctl logs

users.label: Users
users.tooltip: Linux users UID≥1000, sudo membership, SSH keys

files.label: Files
files.tooltip: File browser: download, upload restricted to the inbox (50 MB max), generated scp/rsync commands

firewall.label: Firewall
firewall.tooltip: ufw: allow/deny rules, 60s watchdog to avoid lock-out

updates.label: Updates
updates.tooltip: apt list --upgradable + run apt upgrade (all or security only)

packages.label: Packages
packages.tooltip: Full-text search on the Ubuntu catalog + install/remove + holds

settings.title: Settings
settings.sshUserHint: Pre-filled in the SSH button. Empty = uses the terminal's current user.
settings.criticalHint: If enabled, blocks <0>reboot</0>, <1>service_stop</1> on critical services (docker, nginx, ssh, postgres…) and <2>package.remove</2> on critical packages. Enable it for the Nexus server itself and production machines.
